label: Xenotype pawn kind
description: Maps a xenotype to a pawn kind for use in override lists that control which pawn kind is generated for each xenotype slot.

xenotype.label: Xenotype
xenotype.description: XenotypeDef that this mapping applies to.

pawnKind.label: Pawn kind
pawnKind.description: PawnKindDef to use when generating a pawn for this xenotype slot.
